title: Bootstrap Pecan repository
body:
## What was done

Created the **Pecan** monorepo with initial workspace layout, toolchain stubs, and the first compiler/analysis crates that every later v0.0 task builds on.

## Why it mattered

This commit (`269ac9d`, *Initial Commit*) is the **start** of the v0.0 cutoff window. Without a frozen bootstrap SHA, later Pecan-era research could not be replayed or compared after the repository was deleted.

## Outcome

Opened the Feb 18 – Mar 5, 2026 prototype band documented in `data/v0.0/article.md`.
